title: Robust Syrian Porcini Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Syrian dish featuring porcini mushrooms, cooked in a copper mug tagine to create a bitter and crunchy hangover cure, Whole30 friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the copper mug tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the porcini mushrooms, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
